name: Firefight B — 'An Even Encounter' (Tobruk, rulebook p.24)
description: British Stuart Mk.III x6 vs Italian M13/40 x15 on one mapboard section. Official Avalon Hill firefight: 10 turns, Firefight Victory Point Table, Scenario One rules (movement + AP direct fire). Entry simplified: both sides begin ON their entry edge (British north, Italians south) and turn 1 counts as their entry move — MA-1 remaining, no fire on turn 1 (they moved).
rules_scope: Tobruk Scenario One pp.4-5 + Firefight rules p.24. In scope: vehicular movement/facing/pivot/reverse, AP-vs-armor three-question fire, target acquisition, fire initiation doctrine, same-hex fire. Out of scope (declared): crew casualties (p.5.e says ignore in Scenario 1), experimental/optional rules, personnel, artillery.

game.seed_note: RNG seed fixed per game in the state file; every roll is logged.
